title: Availability of funds
doc_html:
§1804.  Availability of funds

Projects may be undertaken only after the state liaison officer has determined that sufficient funds are available for meeting the state's share of project costs.  

Amended by Acts 1980, No. 827, §2.
doc_text:
§1804.  Availability of funds
Projects may be undertaken only after the state liaison officer has determined that sufficient funds are available for meeting the state's share of project costs.
Amended by Acts 1980, No. 827, §2.
